svg.text: Network logs in. Ranked actions out. — local-first, multi-vendor, sanitize-before-LLM

g.text: A / B / C / D / F + trend
Every byte that reaches the LLM (local or cloud) is pre-scrubbed: $6$/$9$ hashes · SSH keys · SNMP communities · RADIUS secrets · public IPv4/IPv6 → redacted.
Local-first by default. No API keys needed. No telemetry. Your configs and logs never leave the host unless you explicitly enable Claude.
netlog-ai serve · netlog-ai mcp · netlog-ai analyze
